plan_adherence_notes: Execution did not follow the plan beyond creating task artifacts. Relative to `ff/Tbayes-market-i6y-execute-step-5`, the branch diff adds only `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-i6y-execute-step-5-execute-step-5/{questions,research,plan}.json`; there are still no edits to `backend/server.py` or `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py`, and the parent step still lacks `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-i6y-execute-step-5/execution.json`. The live code continues to serialize `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` as the legacy four-field row `{marketId, outcomeId, netSize, lastTradePrice}`, and the existing exposure projection test at `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py:4767` still freezes that baseline payload. Validation reran `python3 -m pytest -v --tb=short tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketApiUnitTests::test_root_route_returns_service_index tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests`, which passed with 15 tests in this checkout, but that proof exists only in validation and only confirms the unchanged baseline remains green.
reason: Reject. The research is strong and the plan follows from it, but the reviewed branch never executes the planned work: there is no replay-backed `/positions` implementation, no additive `unrealizedPnl` field, no expanded replay/P&L regression coverage, no parent `execution.json`, and no final execution commit. The focused pytest selector passes, but it is still passing against the unchanged four-field `/positions` contract, so this branch does not satisfy the requested validated-execution state.
